mappings.reason: Addresses the remediation of non-inventoried devices by requiring a process to resolve unauthorized assets, aligning with the CCF control's owner assignment requirement.
Active discovery tools perform network discovery scans — the same mechanism class as ARP scanning — directly implementing the CCF control's quarterly reconciliation objective.
Passive discovery tools identify network-connected assets using an equivalent network discovery mechanism, satisfying the CCF control's scan-based reconciliation objective.
